title: ligustrum obtusifolium var. velutinum
intro: Ligustrum obtusifolium var. velutinum, also known as Velvet Privet, is a plant species in the Oleaceae family, characterized by its grey-green leaves and small, fragrant flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Velvet Privet include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce stress, improve immune function, and protect against infections. Velvet Privet can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional remedies.
